team_name: AI-Powered Court Order Compliance Tracking Dashboard
summary: AI-Powered Court Order Compliance Tracking Dashboard for Government departments to track court order compliance and generate verified action plans.
key_steps: AI extracts directive, deadline, responsible department
Live dashboard tracks status with automatic alerts
Department updates progress as work continues
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
